RULING:
DEFENDANT RPI COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE TRIAL DATE AND REOPEN DISCOVERY

No objection made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant RPI Company's motion to vacate trial date and reopen discovery: The court treated defendant's motion as a motion to continue the trial date, which is granted. The trial date, which has already passed and which has a return date of May 13, 2013, is continued to March 17, 2014 at 11:15am in Department 503. The new trial date serves as the initial trial date for discovery purposes only as to RPI. Discovery remains closed as related to all other defendants. No party opposed a trial continuance.
